slice: Include browser audio routing evidence in the existing exported iPhone sound-proof packet.

behavior.privacy: Unknown routing keys are excluded from exported proof packets.
behavior.compatibility: Packets remain exportable when routing evidence is absent; routing is null.

verification.method: isolated Node execution using byte-equivalent committed packet builder and contract assertions
assertions: routing state is exported when present
unknown routing and audibility fields are excluded

evidence_limits: A passing source contract does not prove browser execution.
Browser routing state does not prove physical speaker emission.
The latest commit is not deployed.
